_description: Reference: canned responses returned by mockResponse() in llmClient.ts for the sequential pipeline. Matched by keyword in the prompt string.

response_high_priority.text: We sincerely apologize for the delay. A senior agent will contact you within the hour to resolve this immediately.

response_normal.text: Thank you for reaching out. We are looking into this and will get back to you shortly.

response_escalate.reason: High-priority ticket with negative sentiment — requires immediate human attention.

response_no_escalate.reason: Issue can be resolved with an automated response.
